text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we head into the Satsuki Sho, Yaeno Muteki
finds herself reflecting on her past.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Back when she was younger, she would react to
her emotions with physical strength. It was a habit
she just couldn't break.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But the strict guidance of her grandfather and the
close support of her grandmother brought her to
where she is today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Carrying her gratitude for her grandparents close
to her heart, Yaeno Muteki swears to win the
Satsuki Sho to prove how much she's grown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And her friend Sakura Chiyono O will be running
as well. The first leg of the Classic Triple Crown
tour is about to begin!
